overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin driving through a rainy urban street in a vehicle simulator game. Windshield wipers actively clear heavy rain as the vehicle navigates wet roads lined with modern buildings and trees, overtaking several cars in moderate traffic conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban avenue with modern office buildings

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy rain on a multi-lane city street, windshield wipers sweeping rhythmically across the glass

entered.detail: truck dashboard with illuminated gauges and control buttons visible in the cabin interior
GPS display showing route information mounted on the right side of the dashboard
windshield wipers moving back and forth clearing heavy rain from the front glass
multi-story modern office building with glass facade and illuminated windows
row of green leafy trees lining the left side of the urban street
rain-soaked asphalt road surface with visible lane markings and reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the driver's perspective inside a truck cabin during a heavy downpour. The windshield wipers actively clear rain as the vehicle proceeds down a multi-lane urban avenue. Modern glass office buildings line the right side while a row of trees borders the left, with wet asphalt reflecting the overcast sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban avenue with mixed commercial buildings

events.description: overtaking a red sedan on the right side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while overtaking slower traffic on the right side in heavy rainfall conditions

notable_agents.action: red sedan being overtaken on the right side, moving slower than the truck

entered.detail: multi-story brick apartment building with rectangular windows replacing the modern glass structure

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving through the rain-soaked avenue, passing a red sedan on the right. The architecture transitions from modern glass to older brick buildings while the tree line on the left moves closer to the vehicle. The wipers maintain their steady rhythm against the heavy downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban street with commercial facades

events.description: overtaking a white hatchback on the right side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic density on the wet urban road, maintaining safe distance while passing vehicles on the right

notable_agents.action: white hatchback being overtaken on the right side in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: urban commercial building with ground-floor storefronts and upper floors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck continuing through the rainy urban environment, overtaking a white hatchback on the right. The tree line on the left is now quite close to the vehicle, and new commercial buildings appear on the right. The heavy rain persists with wipers working continuously as the vehicle maintains its forward progress through the wet city streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin navigating a rain-soaked urban avenue as the surrounding architecture and roadside greenery gradually shift. It begins amidst a heavy downpour, with windshield wipers actively clearing the glass while the vehicle passes modern glass office buildings and a distant row of trees. As the truck proceeds, the scene transitions from these sleek structures to older brick buildings, and the tree line on the left begins to draw closer to the vehicle. The camera then continues forward, overtaking a white hatchback as new commercial buildings emerge on the right. Finally, the vehicle maintains its steady progress through the wet city streets, with the persistent rain and rhythmic wipers framing the evolving urban landscape.
